top_signals.title: Ukraine targets Russian shipping in ‘unprecedented’ drone assault
top_signals.summary: Over the past week, Kyiv has struck vessels in the Sea of Azov at a faster pace than during the 1980s Iran-Iraq tanker wars
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil Surges as Hormuz Tanker Attacks Mount, Blockade Resumes
top_signals.summary: Brent oil surged again as the truce between the US and Iran collapsed and fresh attacks on shipping in the Strait of Hormuz put new pressure on supplies transiting the world’s most important energy chokepoint.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: US CPI Falls for the First Time Since 2020, Core Gauge Flat
top_signals.summary:
US consumer prices declined in June for the first time in six years and a key gauge of underlying inflation was little changed, taking some pressure off the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates.
Frances Donald, Chief Economist at RBC Capital Markets, reacts to June CPI. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Warsh Says Fed Has 'No Tolerance' for Persistent Inflation
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh said policymakers at the central bank have no tolerance for high inflation during remarks to the House Financial Services Committee. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil touches $87 as battle for Strait of Hormuz alarms energy markets
top_signals.summary: Brent crude climbs after US responds to Iranian attacks on tankers with fresh round of strikes
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Freight Distress Report: Carrier, logistics closures erase over 245 jobs
top_signals.summary:
Warehouse closures and bankruptcy filings hit more firms across trucking, logistics, intermodal and trailer businesses.

top_signals.summary: Fed's Waller says rate hike may be needed if core inflation stays hot  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Fatal ICE Shooting Draws Maine Vigils as Scrutiny Grows
top_signals.summary: Security footage obtained by The Associated Press shows the aftermath of the shooting of a man in Maine by ICE officers, including a white car circling in an intersection, a law enforcement SUV stopping the car and agents opening the door and pulling out a body. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Policy paper: Alternative Investment Fund Managers Regulation – Draft SI and Policy note
top_signals.summary: Draft legislation to reform the regulatory framework for Alternative Investment Fund managers, streamlining the regulation to support growth and tailoring for UK markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.summary: The three companies are suspected of having prearranged winners in bids for refrigeration equipment contracts held every few years by Seven-Eleven Japan.
